name: engineer
description: Software-engineering governance team-in-a-box: an intake-refiner that extracts testable requirements from a story/requirements doc/project without inventing them; a Manager (Alakazam) that conducts the whole delivery loop (intake → plan → build → review → ship-check → audit → merge-handoff) as the single voice to the human; a story-implementer that decomposes projects into ordered stories then plans and builds; a debugger; code, api-contract, data-model, application-security (appsec), performance, and architecture reviewers; a fullspectrum-reviewer (standing cross-domain pass — whole ADR catalog, seams between reviewer lanes); a red team; and an ADR-amender. Risk-tier decided once and persisted, ADR token-cache with a live savings line, deterministic hooks (protected paths behind review reports, human-only release/destructive commands) plus opt-in team gates, audited auditors, and an anti-kafka charter. Per-project config: .governance.json.
